May Student Plays Program of our Theater Department

Kadir Has University Theater Department students are performing their graduation plays.

The following plays are included in the May program:

May 7-8, 20:00: “Wild Duck” / Stage KHAS

May 10-11, 20:30: “Punk Rock” / Stage KHAS

May 13, 21:00: “WDBDHMDHMDHMNM” (Guest Play) / Stage KHAS

May 14-15, 20:30: “Wild Duck” / Stage KHAS

May 20, 20:30: “Particles” / Stage KHAS

May 21-22, 20:30: “Courage” / Stage KHAS

May 23, 20:00: “The Cherry Orchard” / Stage KHAS

May 30, 20:30: “Courage” / D Block Grand Hall
